title: Loan fund committees to be bodies corporate
doc_html:
§1753.  Loan fund committees to be bodies corporate

The parish school loan fund committees created under this Sub-part are constituted bodies corporate with the power to sue and be sued.

§1753.  Loan fund committees to be bodies corporate
The parish school loan fund committees created under this Sub-part are constituted bodies corporate with the power to sue and be sued.
